'''Calipp''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with twelve [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that was located in the [[Faarlsun system/Legends|Faarlsun system]], a part of the [[Parthovian Cluster/Legends|Parthovian Cluster]]<ref name="WbC" /> in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet occupied the sixth and outermost [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Faarlsun]].<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Calipp was mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Faarlsun [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Calipp, in grid square T-4.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
